name: PrivHound: Any credential source → login → admin (unified)
description: All paths up to 7 hops that include a login edge (PHCanLoginAs or PHCanLoginViaRunas) to a privileged target.
query:
MATCH p=(u:PHUser)-[*1..7]->(t:PHPrivTarget)
WHERE any(r IN relationships(p) WHERE type(r) IN ["PHCanLoginAs","PHCanLoginViaRunas"])
RETURN p
